MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeiffer; Clerk: JIRoque; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Dave Marcolini, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendants, Panfilo Aramas and Dora Ledezma, are present.
Attorney, Charles Spiegel, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
